task_title: Etapa 1 - client visual skin spec
Etapa 1 - client visual skin spec
summary: Generated the client branding spec, the visual role/access spec, and the UI validation plan for the Acelerador Medico MVP visual validation phase. Consolidated the available branding assets and documented the design-system file path currently present in the repository.

task_title: Etapa 2 - login screen visual validation
Etapa 2 - login screen visual validation
summary: Implemented a branded login screen for Acelerador Medico with simulated role-based preview entry for Admin, Mentor, and Aluno. Updated the app entry flow to start at /login, added local preview-session support, copied selected client assets into frontend/public/branding, and generated the stage report.

task_title: Etapa 3 - mentor screen visual validation
Etapa 3 - mentor screen visual validation
summary: Built a unified Mentor visual shell for the Acelerador Medico MVP, updated Matrix, Command Center, and Radar to share the same premium navigation and visual hierarchy, and added mocked support areas for Produtos, Alunos, and Usuario without introducing new backend flows.

task_title: Etapa 4 - student screen visual validation
Etapa 4 - student screen visual validation
summary: Built a dedicated Aluno visual surface with its own shell, a radar-centered journey view, lighter information density than the Mentor experience, and mocked support panels for Produtos, Mentores, and Usuario. Added the new /app/aluno route, pointed the Aluno login preview to it, and documented the stage report.

task_title: Etapa 5 - admin screen visual validation
Etapa 5 - admin screen visual validation
summary: Built a dedicated Admin visual surface with its own institutional shell, strategic summaries for products, mentors, students, and governance, and a direct preview route at /app/admin. Updated the login flow and top-level navigation to include the Admin experience and documented the stage report.

task_title: Etapa 6 - visual audit
Etapa 6 - visual audit
summary: Generated the consolidated visual audit for Login, Mentor, Aluno, and Admin with explicit layout review per screen, plus a written priority list for final UI refinements based on the current implementation state.

task_title: Fase 2 - especificacao dos CRUDs administrativos
Fase 2 - especificacao dos CRUDs administrativos
summary: Defined the canonical administrative CRUD scope for Fase 2, including hierarchy, dependencies, mandatory fields, update and soft-delete rules, recommended implementation order by small blocks, and an execution checklist for validating each deliverable before implementation.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 1 - Cliente/Empresa real no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 1 - Cliente/Empresa real no Admin
summary: Implemented the first real administrative block with authenticated admin endpoints for listing, creating, and reading Cliente/Empresa records, plus Admin screen integration for client selection, detail viewing, and minimal client creation. Updated login to support real local admin and mentor authentication while keeping aluno preview mode, and validated the block with backend tests, frontend smoke tests, and frontend build.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 1 - refinamento do cadastro de cliente no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 1 - refinamento do cadastro de cliente no Admin
summary: Refined the Admin client experience by adding Clientes to the support rail and replacing the fixed form with a modal-based flow for Cadastrar cliente, including confirmation, success feedback, automatic close, and immediate visibility of the new client in the main screen.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 1 - limpeza da superficie de clientes no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 1 - limpeza da superficie de clientes no Admin
summary: Simplified the Admin client surface by removing the sliding rail, reducing the default Centro Institucional state to active client cards only, and introducing a cleaner Clientes mode with a selected client card and adjacent linked-product area. Repositioned the client creation CTA to the top-right of the card section and kept the modal creation flow validated.

task_title: Fase 2 - consolidacao dos ajustes de superficie do Admin
Fase 2 - consolidacao dos ajustes de superficie do Admin
summary: Consolidated the Admin surface adjustments from Block 1 into the canonical Fase 2 documentation so the next CRUD blocks inherit the same clean opening state, top-right create CTA, modal create flow, and no sliding-rail pattern.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - Produto/Mentoria real por cliente no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - Produto/Mentoria real por cliente no Admin
summary: Implemented the second administrative block with real product-by-client operations in the Admin: authenticated backend endpoints for listing, creating, and reading Produto/Mentoria records by client, plus frontend integration for client-anchored product listing, product detail, and modal-based product creation while preserving the clean Centro Institucional opening state.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - limpeza da leitura central de cliente e produto no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - limpeza da leitura central de cliente e produto no Admin
summary: Cleaned the Admin central surface for the client and product views by hiding the client section header when Produtos is selected and making the product creation CTA appear only in the empty-product state inside the product area.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - limpeza visual da area Cliente no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - limpeza visual da area Cliente no Admin
summary: Refined the Cliente area in the Admin by removing the white Clientes title and the yellow Cliente selecionado and Produtos ligados labels, while simplifying the empty-product state to a single inline Cadastrar Produto... link.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - limpeza final da area Cliente e reset de erro stale
Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - limpeza final da area Cliente e reset de erro stale
summary: Removed the residual product title from the Cliente area, kept the empty state as a single inline Cadastrar Produto... link, and fixed stale async errors by resetting resource data and error state whenever a resource becomes disabled during panel/context changes.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - leitura somente por cards de produto no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - leitura somente por cards de produto no Admin
summary: Removed the expanded product detail surface from the Admin so the Produto/Mentoria view now stays card-only, keeping the central area visually cleaner while preserving the existing product creation flow.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - hierarquia visual de produto no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 2 - hierarquia visual de produto no Admin
summary: Applied the same clean surface principle to the Produtos area by replacing the previous leftover client framing with a sequential Produto-Mentor-Pilar hierarchy, adding the shared Cadastrar... chooser to both Clientes and Produtos, and preserving modal-based create flows with a single inline product CTA when a client has no products.

task_title: Fase 2 - consolidacao documental do baseline visual administrativo
Fase 2 - consolidacao documental do baseline visual administrativo
summary: Consolidated the current Admin baseline into the canonical phase documents, documenting the distinction between root create CTA and contextual Cadastrar... chooser, the clean Cliente surface, and the sequential Produto -> Mentor -> Pilar reading model for subsequent blocks.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 3 - Mentor real por produto no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 3 - Mentor real por produto no Admin
summary: Implemented the third administrative block with real mentor-by-product operations in the Admin: authenticated backend endpoints for listing and creating mentors linked to a product, product primary mentor linkage, and frontend integration in the clean Produto -> Mentor -> Pilar surface plus a dedicated Mentores support area with modal-based creation.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 3 - remocao dos links inline de cadastro no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 3 - remocao dos links inline de cadastro no Admin
summary: Removed the inline create links from empty admin states so the support areas now rely only on the shared Cadastrar... action as the single create entry point, while keeping the empty-state messages and existing modal flows intact.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 4 - Aluno real por mentor no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 4 - Aluno real por mentor no Admin
summary: Implemented the fourth administrative block with real student-by-mentor operations in the Admin: backend endpoints for creating and listing students by mentor and product, mentor-aware student linkage in enrollments, and frontend integration for the Alunos support area with product and mentor context plus modal-based student creation.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 5 - Pilar real por produto no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 5 - Pilar real por produto no Admin
summary: Implemented the fifth administrative block with real pillar-by-product operations in the Admin: authenticated backend endpoints for listing and creating pillars under a product-backed method protocol, frontend integration for the clean Produto -> Mentor -> Pilar hierarchy with vertical expansion, and a modal-based pillar creation flow through the shared Cadastrar... action.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 6 - Metrica real por Pilar no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 6 - Metrica real por Pilar no Admin
summary: Implemented the sixth administrative block with real metric-by-pillar operations in the Admin: authenticated backend endpoints for listing and creating metrics under an active pillar, metric uniqueness aligned to the pillar scope, and frontend integration in the Produtos hierarchy so each expanded pillar can reveal its metrics and create new ones through the shared Cadastrar... flow.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 7 - Vinculos administrativos de aluno no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 7 - Vinculos administrativos de aluno no Admin
summary: Implemented the seventh administrative block with real student link management in the Admin: logical enrollment history on the backend, justified student reassignment between mentors of the same product, justified soft unlinking, and frontend integration in the Alunos area through a focused Gerir vinculo modal over the selected student card.

task_title: Fase 2 - Bloco 8 - Ingestao inicial de indicadores no Admin
Fase 2 - Bloco 8 - Ingestao inicial de indicadores no Admin
summary: Implemented the eighth administrative block with initial indicator ingestion in the Admin: product-scoped metric catalog on the backend, active-metric validation for initial loads, and frontend integration in the Alunos area through a focused Carga inicial modal over the selected student card, allowing the first metric and checkpoint load that feeds Centro, Radar, and Matriz.

task_title: Carga simulada exclusiva para login do mentor
Carga simulada exclusiva para login do mentor
summary: Implemented an isolated commercial demo dataset for the mentor login only. The backend now serves dedicated mentor-only endpoints with a curated scenario for Grupo Acelerador Medico, Mentoria Acelerador Medico, Dr. Jose Netto, five pillars, twelve metrics and ten students distributed across the decision matrix quadrants, while the frontend mentor views consume those routes without polluting the administrative CRUD stores.
